name: Meadow
description: Open meadow breezes with gentle grass whispers

prompts.SessionStart: bright ascending finger cymbal ring with shimmering overtones, small bell chime, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SessionEnd: descending wind chime tones with smooth ringing decay, small bell chime, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.Stop: single tiny bell strike with bright clear ring and sustain, small bell chime, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct finger cymbal tick with brief shimmer, small bell, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PostToolUse: short wind chime ping confirming with bright ring, small bell chime, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two tiny bell tones with questioning rising melody, small bell chime, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady finger cymbal ring with clear rhythmic shimmer, small bell, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStart: wind chime struck producing two diverging bell tones, small bell chime, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStop: clear tiny bell ping returning with distinct ring, small bell chime, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright energetic finger cymbal strike with shimmering burst, small bell chime, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
